headline.purpose: Section headings. text-2xl to text-3xl Silkscreen 700.

title.purpose: Sub-section headings and card titles. text-lg to text-xl Silkscreen 700.

label.purpose: Nav links, badges, tech tags. text-xs uppercase tracking-widest Silkscreen 700.

mono.purpose: Terminal output and prompts. VT323 400. ASCII subset only.

shadows.name: mac-window-shadow
shadows.purpose: Mac mode terminal container drop shadow. Period-authentic 1px offset.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for bevel hover transitions and background-position shifts.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Duration for color transitions on hover states.

motion.name: crt-flicker
motion.purpose: CRT flicker on theme toggle: white overlay flash at 0ms, 40ms, 80ms, 120ms, 200ms.

motion.name: typewriter
motion.purpose: Terminal line reveal delay between each typed line.

components.name: CTA Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Inky black in Mac mode, teal in NeXT mode.
components.html: See Why It Matters
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: oklch(14% 0.008 65); color: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); font-weight: 700; font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-cta:hover { background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .ds-cta-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .dark .ds-cta { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .dark .ds-cta:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); }

components.name: Icon Square
components.description: 48x48px accent-filled square containing an SVG icon. Used for feature items, architecture layers, use case cards.
components.css: .ds-icon-square { width: 3rem; height: 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; } .ds-icon-square svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .dark .ds-icon-square { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .dark .ds-icon-square svg { color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); }

components.name: Nav Link Active
components.description: Active navigation pill. Paper background in Mac, next-light background in NeXT.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; } .dark .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(58% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); }

components.name: Nav Link Inactive
components.description: Inactive navigation link. Muted text with hover background.
components.css: .ds-nav { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav:hover { background: oklch(95.5% 0.004 85); } .dark .ds-nav { color: oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .dark .ds-nav:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); }

components.name: Tech Badge
components.description: Technology tag in the Built With strip. Bevel-raised border in NeXT mode with hover highlight.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-badge:hover { border-color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-badge-dot { width: 0.25rem; height: 0.25rem; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); border-radius: 0; } .dark .ds-badge { background: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .dark .ds-badge:hover { border-color: oklch(72% 0.012 85) oklch(6% 0.005 270) oklch(6% 0.005 270) oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .dark .ds-badge-dot { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); }

components.name: Terminal Window
components.description: Mac/NeXT terminal container with title bar, typewriter text, and blinking cursor.
components.html:
rezusctl

$ rezusctl init

Cluster ready. 2 nodes. 30s.

$ _
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .dark .ds-terminal { border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270); box-shadow: none; } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, oklch(0% 0 0) 0px, oklch(0% 0 0) 1px, oklch(100% 0 0) 1px, oklch(100% 0 0) 2px); } .dark .ds-terminal-bar { border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } .ds-terminal-dot { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; } .ds-terminal-title { margin-left: 0.5rem; font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .dark .ds-terminal-title { color: oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .dark .ds-terminal-dot { display: none; } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 1rem; } .ds-terminal-line { font-family: VT323, Courier New, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); margin: 0.25rem 0; } .dark .ds-terminal-line { color: oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .dark .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(60% 0.08 170); } .ds-terminal-cursor { color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); animation: ds-blink 1s step-end infinite; } .dark .ds-terminal-cursor { color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } @keyframes ds-blink { 0%, 49% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } }

components.name: Accent Bar
components.description: Horizontal underline bar for section headings. Three sizes: sm, md, lg.

components.name: Accent Dot
components.description: Small square marker for list bullets, status indicators. Two sizes plus active pulse variant.

components.name: Section Badge
components.description: Section label with // separator. Silkscreen uppercase.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Label + input + help/error text. Mac: 1px border. NeXT: 2px sunken bevel. Error and disabled states.

components.name: Text Area
components.description: Multi-line VT323 monospace input. Resizable. Mac: 1px border. NeXT: sunken bevel.

components.name: Select
components.description: Native select with custom chevron. Mac: 1px border. NeXT: sunken bevel.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Hidden native input + styled box. Mac: ink fill when checked. NeXT: teal fill with raised bevel.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Hidden native input + styled box + dot. Mac: ink dot. NeXT: teal dot with raised bevel.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: NeXTSTEP-style two-position switch. Track + thumb. Mac: ink on/rule off. NeXT: teal on/mid off.

components.name: Search
components.description: Full-width search with magnifying glass icon and keyboard hint.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Horizontal tab strip with bottom border. Mac: ink active border. NeXT: teal active border.

components.name: Alert Banner
components.description: System notification banner. Info, positive, negative variants. Icon + title + text.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Ephemeral bottom-right notification. Positive/negative variants with dismiss button.

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Determinate progress with label and value. Standard and danger variants. Mac: accent-gold fill. NeXT: teal fill.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Collapsible sections using native details/summary. Chevron rotation animation.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal with title bar, body, primary/secondary actions. Mac: window shadow. NeXT: raised bevel frame.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: 14rem fixed-width vertical navigation. Icon links, active pill, logo header, version footer.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Horizontal path with / separators. Mac: muted links, ink current. NeXT: teal current.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page button strip with ellipsis, prev/next arrows. Mac: ink active. NeXT: teal active.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Square user representation with initials or image. Three sizes: sm, md, lg.

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Bordered table with alternating rows, status indicators, VT323 mono values.

components.name: Code Snippet
components.description: Code block with filename header and copy button. VT323 monospace body.

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Centered placeholder with icon square, title, description, CTA button.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with pulse animation. Text and heading variants.

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Colored square for resource health. Positive, negative (blink), warning, neutral variants.

components.name: Stat Block
components.description: Compact KPI display for dashboards: label + value. Mac: paper bg, 1px rule border. NeXT: next-black bg, sunken bevel.

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline text badge for resource phase/stage labels. Positive, negative, warning, neutral variants. Mac: surface bg, 1px semantic border. NeXT: next-dark bg, 1px semantic border.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Horizontal rule separator. Mac: rule color. NeXT: next-mid.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Contextual hover tooltip. Mac: paper bg, ink border, window shadow. NeXT: next-dark bg, next-light border.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Floating context menu with grouped items. Danger variant. Mac: paper bg, 1px border. NeXT: next-dark bg, raised bevel.

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: ⌘K keyboard launcher with VT323 search input, grouped results, keyboard navigation. Mac: paper bg, 1px border. NeXT: next-dark bg, raised bevel.

components.name: Cluster Selector
components.description: Multi-cluster dropdown trigger with per-cluster health dot. Expanded listbox with status, name, meta, selected check.

components.name: Scope Filter
components.description: Multi-select pill bar for namespaces, labels, projects. Selected pills invert; supports overflow count.

components.name: Time Range Picker
components.description: Segmented preset group (5m to 30d) + custom range trigger + refresh interval indicator.

components.name: KPI Tile
components.description: Compact stat tile with VT323 value, inline SVG sparkline, delta indicator, meta caption.

components.name: Time-Series Chart
components.description: SVG line chart with grid, axes, two series, hover crosshair, floating tooltip.

components.name: Gauge Chart
components.description: Half-circle utilization dial with track, value arc, needle, threshold bands.

components.name: Bar Chart
components.description: Vertical histogram with stacked segments (count + error), Y/X axes, percentile summary.

components.name: Node Card
components.description: Resource card with status, meta grid, capacity bars (CPU/mem/disk/pods), action footer.

components.name: Pod Row
components.description: Horizontal workload-unit row: status, name, ready, restarts, resources, IP, node, age, menu.

components.name: Alert Rule Row
components.description: Alert definition row with state pulse, severity badge, query, labels, and actions.

components.name: Log Line
components.description: Structured log entry: timestamp, severity badge, source, message, key-value fields.

components.name: Trace Waterfall
components.description: Gantt-style trace span visualization with indented spans, color-encoded kinds, error markers.

components.name: Query Builder
components.description: Query composer with mode toggle, tokenized editor, facet pills, and execution status.

narrative.overview:
Two operating systems, one machine. Light mode is a 1984 Macintosh 128K: bitmap fonts, 1px borders, stark contrast, amber highlights on warm white. Dark mode is a 1988 NeXTcube: 3D beveled edges, CRT scanlines, phosphor afterglow, muted teal on deep black. The site is not decorated to look retro. It IS retro, running natively in the browser.

The system is defiant, precise, and nostalgic. Every element earns its place. No rounded corners, no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no SaaS hero-metric template, no identical card grids. The layout principle is flat: text flows without container boxes, spacing varies for rhythm, and section backgrounds alternate between two surface levels.
keyCharacteristics: Zero border-radius everywhere. Every corner is a right angle.
Dual-era identity: Mac System 1 in light, NeXTSTEP in dark. Fonts stay the same, only colors change.
Committed color strategy: amber gold (light) / teal (dark) carry the accent load.
Flat text layout: no boxes wrapping content. Icon squares, dots, and accent bars punctuate.
3D bevel system for NeXT mode: 2px raised/sunken borders.
CRT overlay: scanline pattern with slow vertical scroll animation.
Bitmap typography: Silkscreen headings, system-ui body, VT323 terminals.

rules.name: The Dual-Accent Rule
rules.body: Light mode uses amber gold. Dark mode uses teal. Never mix: amber never appears in dark mode, teal never appears in light mode. Each accent occupies the same structural positions in both modes.

rules.name: The Alternating Rhythm Rule
rules.body: Sections alternate between two background levels. Light: paper and surface. Dark: next-black and next-dark. The challenge section inverts: ink (light) and next-dark (dark). This rhythm never breaks.

rules.name: The No-Gray-Accent Rule
rules.body: In NeXT mode, next-light is a bright neutral for UI chrome (active nav pills only). It is never used for accent purposes. That role belongs exclusively to next-teal.

rules.name: The No-Serif Rule
rules.body: Serif fonts never appear. The system is entirely sans-serif + bitmap + mono.

rules.name: The Font-Consistency Rule
rules.body: Font families are identical between light and dark modes. Only colors change.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Mode Rule
rules.body: Mac mode is always flat: borders are always 1px solid ink. NeXT mode uses bevels: borders are always 2px with directional shading. Never mix bevel styles within a mode.

dos: Do use zero border-radius on every element.
Do use Silkscreen for headings/labels/nav, system-ui for body, VT323 for terminals.
Do alternate section backgrounds every section.
Do use amber gold (light) / teal (dark) as the exclusive accent.
Do use 2px bevels in NeXT mode for interactive elements.
Do use warm-tinted neutrals (hue 85 for Mac, hue 270 for NeXT).
Do vary section padding for rhythm.
donts: Don't wrap text in bordered container boxes.
Don't mix accent colors between modes.
Don't use next-light as an accent color.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring easings.
